title: 末日货轮：Doomsday Cargo Ship
description:
I am the onboard journalist of this cargo ship. The originally calm recording task was completely interrupted by an unforeseen event.

As I stepped onto the main deck, a strange silence immediately surrounded me. The damp sea breeze carried the smell of rust and saltiness, blowing over the empty deck. The stacked containers in the field of vision are like rusty steel tombstones, casting long shadows in the bleak sky. I shouted, only the monotonous sound of cables hitting the mast and the tireless low roar of distant waves responded to me.

The outline of the dock faintly emerged in the mist, and the distance seemed within reach, but it was pulled infinitely far away by this eerie silence. The boundless loneliness did not slowly strike, but completely engulfed me in the moment I realized that I was the only living thing here.

I must go ashore and know what happened. But before that, I need to make sure I can live until that moment. The locks on several containers look a bit loose, perhaps there are tools, medicine, or anything inside that can help me pass through this silent path.

I tightened my grip on the pry bar in my hand. The first container is waiting to be opened.

Game mode:

Can switch between Chinese and English, only supports single player mode in non Chinese regions

Selectable game characters:

Carter, Lu Fengling, Cole, Xu Licheng, He Baoyuan, Xia Xin

In this adventure, we will face challenges such as disasters, zombies, pirates, and survival pressures until the small boat is built, detached from the cargo ship, and returns to land.

1. Open the container to obtain supplies

2. Faced with multiple survival challenges

3. Facing the threat of zombies

4. Pirates board ships

5. Building shelters

6. Creating convenient tools

7. Sea fishing

8. Decompose the container

9. Utilize conditions to collect materials

More content awaits your exploration!
description_short: Something unexpected happened. Stacked containers, faintly visible docks in the mist, I must disembark. Perhaps there are tools and medicine inside the container. We will face challenges such as disasters, zombies, pirates, and survival pressures until the small boat is built and we return to land.
